content: permit(principal,action,resource) when { principal.p_team == "eng" && principal.p_clearance == "high" && resource.r_team == "eng" && resource.r_sensitivity == "confidential" };
permit(principal,action,resource) when { principal.p_team == "eng" && principal.p_country == "eu" && resource.r_team == "eng" && resource.r_region == "eu" };

permit(principal,action,resource) when { principal.p_team == "finance" && principal.p_clearance == "high" && resource.r_team == "finance" && resource.r_region == "us" && resource.r_sensitivity == "confidential" };
permit(principal,action,resource) when { principal.p_team == "finance" && principal.p_role == "auditor" && resource.r_team == "finance" && resource.r_sensitivity == "public" };
permit(principal,action,resource) when { principal.p_team == "hr" && principal.p_country == "us" && resource.r_team == "hr" && resource.r_region == "us" && resource.r_sensitivity == "internal" };
permit(principal,action,resource) when { principal.p_role == "contractor" && principal.p_project == "alpha" && resource.r_project == "alpha" && resource.r_sensitivity == "public" };
permit(principal,action,resource) when { principal.p_role == "contractor" && principal.p_project == "beta" && resource.r_project == "beta" && resource.r_sensitivity == "internal" };
permit(principal,action,resource) when { principal.p_name == "bob" && principal.p_country == "eu" && resource.r_team == "eng" && resource.r_region == "eu" && resource.r_sensitivity == "public" };
permit(principal,action,resource) when { principal.p_name == "carol" && resource.r_team == "finance" && resource.r_region == "us" && resource.r_sensitivity == "public" };
permit(principal,action,resource) when { principal.p_name == "dave" && resource.r_team == "hr" && resource.r_region == "us" && resource.r_sensitivity == "internal" };
permit(principal,action,resource) when { principal.p_team == "eng" && principal.p_clearance == "high" && resource.r_project == "alpha" && resource.r_sensitivity == "secret" };

permit(principal,action,resource) when { principal.p_team == "finance" && principal.p_country == "eu" && resource.r_team == "finance" && resource.r_region == "eu" && resource.r_sensitivity == "public" };
permit(principal,action,resource) when { principal.p_team == "eng" && principal.p_role == "manager" && resource.r_team == "eng" && resource.r_sensitivity == "internal" };
